settings.heading: I cannot even begin to describe how excited I am for you to bring Plaay into your life.
settings.text: I have been practicing as a nutritionist for over 14 years now and I specialize in Gut health. And I’ve come to realize, Our Gut is our Super Power. It’s the foundation of our overall health. Our Immunity, our happy hormone serotonin, our appetite and satiety hormones even the important decisions we make in our life plus our sense of who we are originates in our gut.

settings.heading: Often as adults, we miss experiencing the everyday joy life brings to us so freely.
settings.text: Plaay is on a mission to spark those moments of joy not just through the happiness you’ll feel when you take that first delicious bite but also through the impact of the real natural ingredients on your body.

settings.title: Gut health
settings.text:
Millions of good and bad bacteria mostly live in our gut and you may not know this but In terms of number of cells, we are more bacteria than human.

These bacteria have the power to turn on and off certain genes in our body. So you want to make sure you have more good bacteria and less bad. A strong healthy gut will have the ability to host good bacteria that can do all these good thigs for you and make you feel awesome. We coexist with these bacteria in our body’s ecosystem. They influence us and we influence them, And the one most easy way to influence these bacteria is through FOOD. With every bite of food you eat, you decide which bacteria you’ll feed and what they do in your system.

settings.flip_text_back: We only use our own in-house 100% vegan dark chocolate, which is sweetened with coconut nectar

settings.title: Plaay has a mix of only and only the greatest stuff for your gut so your good bacteria can have a feast in there and make you go wow every day!

settings.flip_text_back: We only use whole nuts, so that you get every last bit of goodness from them.

settings.title: You’ll naturally get even more Omega 3, helping curb inflammation
A much better range of Amino Acids, which are the building blocks of protein
It only has Sunflower Lecithin as this is the best for your gut
Made from 100% Peas and Organic Pumpkin Seeds
We’ve boosted the number of digestive enzymes to make it easier for your gut to digest and absorb
The amino acid profile is very close to what you get from an egg - packed with extra BCAAs
We process our Protein at low temperatures to keep in all the good stuff

settings.section_two_left_side_copy: We’re enriching your gut with a dose of Inulin – a prebiotic that gives the bacteria in your gut the nutrients it needs to stay alive.
settings.section_two_right_side_copy: We’re adding up to 8 billion CFU new bacteria into your gut, with a strain that is able to withstand the acidic environment of your stomach (which has a Ph of between 2.3 to 3.5, stronger than a really sour lemon), allowing it to make its way to your small and large intestines.
settings.section_three_heading: But 71% Dark Chocolate, made in-house with coconut nectar. No soy lecithin.
